---
title: "`r params$title`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
params:
  results_rds: null
  title: Population genomics analysis
  author: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
r <- readRDS(params$results_rds)
if (inherits(r, "PopgenVCFAnalysis")) {
  a <- r
  r <- c(
    list(
      metadata = a$samples$metadata,
      qc_snps = a$variants$qc_ids,
      final_snps = a$variants$ld_ids,
      qc = a$variants$reports
    ),
    a$results
  )
}
```

# Executive summary

The analysis retained **`r nrow(r$metadata)` samples** from **`r data.table::uniqueN(r$metadata$population)` populations**, with **`r length(r$qc_snps)` QC-passing SNPs** and **`r length(r$final_snps)` LD-pruned SNPs**.

The global Weir-Cockerham $F_{ST}$ estimate was **`r sprintf('%.4f', r$fst$global)`**.

# Quality control

```{r}
knitr::kable(r$qc$sequential, digits=2)
```

# Genetic diversity

```{r}
knitr::kable(r$diversity$population, digits=4)
```

# Principal component analysis

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(r$pca$scores, 20), digits=4)
```

# Population differentiation

```{r}
knitr::kable(r$fst$long, digits=4)
```

# DAPC

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$dapc)) knitr::kable(r$dapc$diagnostics, digits=4)
```

# AMOVA

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$amova)) {
  knitr::kable(r$amova$components, digits=4)
  knitr::kable(r$amova$phi, digits=4)
}
```

# Mantel test and isolation by distance

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$ibd)) knitr::kable(r$ibd$summary, digits=4)
```

# ADMIXTURE cross-validation

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$admixture_cv)) knitr::kable(r$admixture_cv, digits=6)
```

# Chromosome-specific results

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$chromosome_summary)) knitr::kable(r$chromosome_summary, digits=4)
```

# Reproducibility

This report was generated from the serialized pipeline result object. Exact input hashes, settings, package versions, and stage runtimes are stored alongside the report.

## Population-structure reproducibility

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$dapc) && "replicate_max_rmse" %in% names(r$dapc$diagnostics)) {
  knitr::kable(r$dapc$diagnostics[, c("K", "assignment_accuracy", "replicate_max_rmse")], digits=4)
}
```

## fastStructure

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$faststructure) && !is.null(r$faststructure$runs)) knitr::kable(r$faststructure$runs)
```

## sNMF

```{r}
if (!is.null(r$snmf) && !is.null(r$snmf$diagnostics)) knitr::kable(r$snmf$diagnostics, digits=6)
```
